_publications._publicationTitle: SVA retrotransposon insertion-associated deletion represents a novel mutational mechanism underlying large genomic copy number changes with non-recurrent breakpoints.

_contextSnippet: Only 5 of the 15 deletion breakpoint-flanking regions harbored repeats in the size range of 244 to 316 bp...A 5.7 kb inverted repeat exhibiting 99% sequence homology was identified
details: Successfully identified repeats of 244-316 bp in 5 of 15 deletion breakpoint-flanking regions and detected 5.7 kb inverted repeat with 99% sequence homology
